mapper.select: SELECT MAX(a.approval_req_id) AS approvalReqId, a.req_date AS reqDate, a.ip_address AS ipAddress, b.ip_address AS ipAddressUser, a.expire_date AS expireDate FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_REQ a LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.tb_user_info b ON a.user_cd = b.user_cd WHERE a.USER_CD = #{userCd} AND a.approval_div_cd = '01' AND a.approval_date IS NULL GROUP BY a.req_date, a.ip_address, a.expire_date, b.ip_address ORDER BY approvalReqId DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COALESCE(A.APPROVAL_DATE, '') AS approvalDate, COALESCE(A.APPROVAL_REQ_REASON, '') AS approvalReqReason, COALESCE(B.APPROVAL_YN, '') AS approvalYn, COALESCE(B.APPROVAL_DATE, '') AS lineApprovalDate, COALESCE(B.APPROVAL_LINE_USER_ID, '') AS approvalLineUserId, COALESCE(A.IP_ADDRESS, '') AS ipAddress, COALESCE(A.AUTH, '') AS auth, COALESCE(A.COM_CD, '') AS comCd FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_REQ A, mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE B WHERE A.USER_CD = B.USER_CD AND A.APPROVAL_DIV_CD = B.APPROVAL_DIV_CD AND A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = B.APPROVAL_REQ_ID AND A.USER_CD = #{userCd} AND A.APPROVAL_REQ_ID = #{approvalReqId} ORDER BY B.APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX
SELECT ENO AS eno, NAME AS name, BRC AS brc, BRNM AS brnm, OFT_C AS oftC, OFT AS oft FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{eno} LIMIT 1
SELECT MENU_NM FROM mhdb.TB_MENU WHERE MENU_URL ILIKE '%' || #{pageName} || '%' LIMIT 1
SELECT MAX(approval_req_id) AS approval_req_id FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_REQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_REQ (USER_CD, APPROVAL_DIV_CD, APPROVAL_REQ_ID, NAME, APPROVAL_REQ_REASON, REQ_DATE, EXPIRE_DATE, BRC, BRNM, OFT_C, OFT, AUTH, COM_CD, IP_ADDRESS, PROGRAM_ID, PROGRAM_NM) VALUES (#{userCd}, #{approvalDivCd}, #{approvalReqId}, #{name}, #{approvalReqReason}, #{reqDate}, #{expireDate}, #{brc}, #{brnm}, #{oftC}, #{oft}, #{auth}, #{comCd}, #{ipAddress}, #{programId}, #{programNm})

INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_LINE (USER_CD, NAME, APPROVAL_DIV_CD, APPROVAL_REQ_ID, APPROVAL_LINE_INDEX, APPROVAL_LINE_USER_ID, APPROVAL_LINE_USER_NM, BEFORE_APPLY_YN) VALUES (#{userCd}, #{name}, #{approvalDivCd}, #{approvalReqId}, #{approvalLineIndex}::integer, #{approvalLineUserId}, #{approvalLineUserNm}, #{beforeApplyYn})
mapper.select:
SELECT U.USER_ID AS userId, U.USER_NM AS userNm, U.USER_CD AS userCd, U.PASSWORD AS password, U.PASSWORD AS passwordOrg, U.TELEPHONE AS telephone, U.EMAIL AS email, U.APPROWAITCNT AS approwaitcnt, U.USE_YN AS useYn, U.PICTURE AS picture, U.LOGIN_DATE AS loginDate, U.BRC AS brc, U.BRNM AS brnm, U.IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, U.EXPIRE_DATE AS expireDate FROM mhdb.TB_USER_INFO U WHERE 1 = 1 AND U.USE_YN != 'D'
AND U.USER_CD = #{userCd}
